name: Ceasar Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup French bread cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the romaine leaves.
2. Wrap them in a clean cloth and refrigerate until ready to use.
3. Warm the bread cubes in an oven preheated to 275°F, tossing until they are hard and dry but not burnt.
4. Mash the garlic with a fork.
5. Place the egg into boiling water and cook for exactly 1 minute. Remove from heat and break the egg into the bowl using a fork.
6. Add salt to the mixture.
7. Add lemon juice, olive oil, and Worcestershire sauce, then mix well (about 1/2 cup dressing).
8. Add lettuce leaves and toss thoroughly to coat.
9. Add Romano cheese and pepper, tossing again.
10. Arrange the salad on two dinner plates.
11. Garnish with croutons. Makes 2 servings.
